<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,maximum-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover">
<meta name="mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="Pedregal Admin">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#c8102e">
<title>Admin — El Pedregal</title>
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<script>
(function(){
  var icon='data:image/png;base64,';
  var m={name:'Pedregal Admin',short_name:'Admin',start_url:'<?= URL_BASE ?>?page=admin',
    display:'standalone',background_color:'#c8102e',theme_color:'#c8102e',
    icons:[{src:icon,sizes:'512x512',type:'image/png',purpose:'any maskable'}]};
  var b=new Blob([JSON.stringify(m)],{type:'application/manifest+json'});
  var l=document.createElement('link'); l.rel='manifest'; l.href=URL.createObjectURL(b);
  document.head.appendChild(l);
})();
</script>
<style>
:root{
  --red:#c8102e;--red-d:#9e0b22;--red-bg:#fdf0f2;--red-bd:#f2c0c8;
  --grn:#15803d;--grn-bg:#f0fdf4;--grn-bd:#86efac;
  --bg:#f4f4f8;--surface:#fff;--border:#e4e4ea;
  --txt:#0f0f14;--txt2:#6b6b7e;--txt3:#9898a8;
  --blue:#2563eb;--blue-bg:#eff6ff;
  --r:14px;--r-sm:10px;--r-xs:7px;
  --sh:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.07),0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
  --sh-lg:0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.06),0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.10);
}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html{font-size:16px;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%}
body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,sans-serif;
  background:var(--bg);color:var(--txt);min-height:100vh;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}

/* ── login ── */
#scr-login{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  padding:24px;background:linear-gradient(145deg,#fff 0%,var(--red-bg) 100%)}
.lg-box{background:#fff;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);
  box-shadow:var(--sh-lg);padding:32px 28px;width:100%;max-width:380px}
.brand{text-align:center;margin-bottom:28px}
.brand-ic{width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:20px;background:var(--red);margin:0 auto 14px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(200,16,46,.32),0 2px 6px rgba(200,16,46,.2)}
.brand-h{font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:var(--txt);letter-spacing:-.3px}
.brand-p{font-size:13px;color:var(--txt2);margin-top:4px}

/* ── form ── */
.field{margin-bottom:16px}
.field label{display:block;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--txt2);margin-bottom:7px}
input[type=password],input[type=date],input[type=text],select{
  width:100%;font-size:16px;padding:13px 14px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:var(--r-sm);background:var(--bg);color:var(--txt);outline:none;
  font-family:inherit;transition:border-color .15s,box-shadow .15s,background .15s;
  appearance:none;-webkit-appearance:none}
input:focus,select:focus{border-color:var(--red);background:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(200,16,46,.1)}

/* ── buttons ── */
.btn{display:block;width:100%;padding:14px 18px;border-radius:var(--r-sm);border:none;
  font-size:15px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;text-align:center;
  transition:transform .12s,opacity .15s}
.btn:active{transform:scale(.97);opacity:.9}
.btn:disabled{opacity:.48;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none}
.btn-red{background:var(--red);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(200,16,46,.28)}
.btn-ghost{background:var(--bg);color:var(--txt2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);box-shadow:none}
.btn-sm{padding:9px 15px;font-size:13px;display:inline-block;width:auto}
.btn-xs{padding:7px 12px;font-size:12px;display:inline-block;width:auto}
.btn-exp{background:var(--grn);color:#fff;padding:9px 16px;border-radius:var(--r-sm);
  border:none;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-family:inherit}
.btn-exp:hover{opacity:.88}

/* ── toast ── */
.toast{border-radius:var(--r-sm);padding:13px 15px;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;
  display:none;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px;border:1.5px solid transparent}
.toast.on{display:flex}
.toast.er{background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red);border-color:var(--red-bd)}

/* ── topbar ── */
#scr-admin{display:none}
.topbar{background:var(--red);color:#fff;padding:0 20px;
  padding-top:env(safe-area-inset-top);
  height:calc(56px + env(safe-area-inset-top));
  display:flex;align-items:flex-end;padding-bottom:10px;
  justify-content:space-between;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;
  box-shadow:0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.12),0 4px 16px rgba(200,16,46,.25)}
.top-l{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.top-ic{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:9px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.18);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.top-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:700}
.top-sub{font-size:11px;opacity:.75;margin-top:1px}
.btn-out{background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22);
  border-radius:20px;color:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;
  padding:6px 13px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-family:inherit}

/* ── wrap ── */
.wrap{max-width:1080px;margin:0 auto;padding:20px 20px 50px}

/* ── stats ── */
.stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(148px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-bottom:20px}
.stat{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);
  box-shadow:var(--sh);padding:18px 16px;text-align:center}
.stat-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:800;color:var(--red);text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:10px}
.stat-num{font-size:38px;font-weight:900;line-height:1;color:var(--txt)}
.stat-tot{font-size:12px;color:var(--txt2);margin-top:5px}
.stat-pill{display:inline-block;background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red);border-radius:20px;
  padding:3px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;margin-top:6px}

/* ── tabs ── */
.tabs{display:flex;border-bottom:1.5px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:16px}
.tbtn{padding:11px 18px;border:none;background:transparent;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;
  color:var(--txt2);cursor:pointer;border-bottom:2.5px solid transparent;
  margin-bottom:-1.5px;font-family:inherit;white-space:nowrap;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px}
.tbtn.on{color:var(--red);border-bottom-color:var(--red)}

/* ── filtros ── */
.filters{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);
  box-shadow:var(--sh);padding:18px;margin-bottom:16px}
.filters-h{font-size:12px;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.6px;
  color:var(--txt3);margin-bottom:14px}
.fil-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:12px}
.fil-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center}

/* ── tabla ── */
.tcard{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);
  box-shadow:var(--sh);overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:16px}
.thead{padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}
.thead-h{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--txt)}
.twrap{overflow-x:auto}
table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px}
thead{background:var(--bg)}
thead th{padding:10px 14px;text-align:left;font-weight:700;color:var(--txt2);
  font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;white-space:nowrap;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
tbody tr{border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);transition:background .1s}
tbody tr:last-child{border-bottom:none}
tbody tr:hover{background:var(--bg)}
td{padding:10px 14px;vertical-align:middle}
.td-n{font-weight:700;font-size:14px}
.pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;border-radius:20px;padding:3px 9px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700}
.pill-red{background:var(--red-bg);color:var(--red)}
.pill-blue{background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue)}
.pill-h{color:var(--red);font-weight:700;font-size:13px}

/* ── historial ── */
.hist-h{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--txt);
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.hist-cnt{background:var(--red);color:#fff;border-radius:20px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:11px;font-weight:800}

/* ── loader ── */
.spin{display:inline-block;width:17px;height:17px;
  border:2.5px solid rgba(200,16,46,.2);border-top-color:var(--red);
  border-radius:50%;animation:rot .7s linear infinite;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:6px}
.spin-w{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);border-top-color:#fff}
@keyframes rot{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
.empty{text-align:center;color:var(--txt3);padding:36px;font-size:14px}

@media(max-width:600px){.wrap{padding:14px 12px 50px}.tbtn{padding:10px 12px;font-size:13px}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="scr-login">
  <div class="lg-box">
    <div class="brand">
      <div class="brand-ic">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" width="48" height="48" fill="none">
          <circle cx="24" cy="18" r="10" fill="white"/>
          <path d="M24 10 Q30 14 30 19 Q30 24 24 26 Q18 24 18 19 Q18 14 24 10Z" fill="#c8102e"/>
          <path d="M10 34 L20 44 L42 28" stroke="white" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" fill="none"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <div class="brand-h">Panel Administrativo</div>
      <div class="brand-p">El Pedregal — Editor Maestro</div>
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>Contraseña de Administrador</label>
      <input type="password" id="inp-clave" placeholder="Clave maestra" autocomplete="current-password">
    </div>
    <div class="toast er" id="toast-login"></div>
    <button class="btn btn-red" id="btn-login" onclick="doLogin()">
      Ingresar como Administrador
    </button>
    <p style="text-align:center;margin-top:16px;font-size:13px;color:var(--txt2)">
      <a id="lnk-sup" href="#" style="color:var(--red);font-weight:700;text-decoration:none">
        ← Vista de supervisores
      </a>
    </p>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="scr-admin">
  <div class="topbar">
    <div class="top-l">
      <div class="top-ic">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="18" height="18" fill="none">
          <circle cx="12" cy="9" r="5" fill="white"/>
          <path d="M12 5 Q15.5 7 15.5 9.5 Q15.5 12 12 13 Q8.5 12 8.5 9.5 Q8.5 7 12 5Z" fill="#c8102e"/>
          <path d="M5 19 L10 24 L22 15" stroke="white" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" fill="none"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="top-title">El Pedregal</div>
        <div class="top-sub">Panel Administrativo</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <button class="btn-out" onclick="doLogout()">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" width="13" height="13" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round">
        <path d="M7 3H4a1 1 0 00-1 1v12a1 1 0 001 1h3M13 15l4-5-4-5M17 10H7"/>
      </svg>
      Salir
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="stats" id="stats">
      <div class="stat"><div class="stat-name">Cargando...</div></div>
    </div>

    <div class="tabs">
      <button class="tbtn on" id="tb-reg" onclick="showTab('reg')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 18 18" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="2" y="3" width="14" height="12" rx="1.5"/><line x1="5" y1="7" x2="13" y2="7"/><line x1="5" y1="10" x2="10" y2="10"/></svg>
        Registros
      </button>
      <button class="tbtn" id="tb-hist" onclick="showTab('hist')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 18 18" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M13 16v-1.5a3 3 0 00-3-3H4a3 3 0 00-3 3V16"/><circle cx="7" cy="6" r="3"/><path d="M17 16v-1.5a3 3 0 00-2.25-2.9M12 2.1a3 3 0 010 5.8"/></svg>
        Personal
      </button>
    </div>

    <div id="T-reg">
      <div class="filters">
        <div class="filters-h">Filtrar registros</div>
        <div class="fil-grid">
          <div class="field" style="margin-bottom:0">
            <label>Supervisor</label>
            <select id="fil-sup">
              <option value="TODOS">Todos</option>
              <option>Edwin</option><option>Damian</option>
              <option>Demetrio</option><option>Gerardo</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="field" style="margin-bottom:0">
            <label>Desde</label><input type="date" id="fil-desde">
          </div>
          <div class="field" style="margin-bottom:0">
            <label>Hasta</label><input type="date" id="fil-hasta">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="fil-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-red btn-sm" onclick="buscar()">Buscar</button>
          <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="limpiar()">Limpiar</button>
          <button class="btn-exp" onclick="exportCSV()">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="13" height="13" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
              <path d="M14 10v3a1 1 0 01-1 1H3a1 1 0 01-1-1v-3M8 2v8M5 7l3 3 3-3"/>
            </svg>
            Exportar CSV
          </button>
          <span id="lbl-tot" style="font-size:13px;color:var(--txt2);margin-left:auto"></span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tcard">
        <div class="thead"><span class="thead-h">Registros de Asistencia</span></div>
        <div class="twrap">
          <table id="tbl">
            <thead><tr>
              <th>Fecha</th><th>DNI</th><th>Nombre</th>
              <th>Supervisor</th><th>Estado</th><th>Labor</th><th>Lote</th>
              <th>H.Inicio</th><th>H.Fin</th>
            </tr></thead>
            <tbody id="tbody"><tr><td colspan="9" class="empty">Use los filtros y presione Buscar</td></tr></tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div id="T-hist" style="display:none">
      <div class="filters" style="margin-bottom:14px">
        <div class="field" style="margin-bottom:0;max-width:260px">
          <label>Supervisor</label>
          <select id="fil-hist" onchange="cargarHist()">
            <option value="TODOS">Todos</option>
            <option>Edwin</option><option>Damian</option>
            <option>Demetrio</option><option>Gerardo</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="cont-hist"><p class="empty">Seleccione un supervisor arriba</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
var APP_URL='<?= URL_BASE ?>';
document.getElementById('lnk-sup').href=APP_URL;

function doLogin(){
  var c=document.getElementById('inp-clave').value.trim();
  var btn=document.getElementById('btn-login');
  clearT();
  if(!c){showT('toast-login','Ingrese la contraseña');return;}
  btn.innerHTML='<span class="spin spin-w"></span> Verificando...'; btn.disabled=true;
  google.script.run
    .withSuccessHandler(function(r){
      btn.innerHTML='Ingresar como Administrador'; btn.disabled=false;
      if(r.ok){
        document.getElementById('scr-login').style.display='none';
        document.getElementById('scr-admin').style.display='block';
        var hoy=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
        document.getElementById('fil-desde').value=hoy;
        document.getElementById('fil-hasta').value=hoy;
        cargarStats(); buscar();
      } else showT('toast-login','Contraseña incorrecta');
    })
    .withFailureHandler(function(e){btn.innerHTML='Ingresar como Administrador';btn.disabled=false;showT('toast-login','Error: '+e.message);})
    .verificarAdmin(c);
}
function doLogout(){
  document.getElementById('scr-admin').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('inp-clave').value='';
  document.getElementById('scr-login').style.display='flex';
}
function showTab(t){
  document.getElementById('T-reg').style.display=t==='reg'?'block':'none';
  document.getElementById('T-hist').style.display=t==='hist'?'block':'none';
  document.getElementById('tb-reg').classList.toggle('on',t==='reg');
  document.getElementById('tb-hist').classList.toggle('on',t==='hist');
  if(t==='hist')cargarHist();
}
function cargarStats(){
  google.script.run.withSuccessHandler(function(res){
    var sups=['Edwin','Damian','Demetrio','Gerardo'];
    document.getElementById('stats').innerHTML=sups.map(function(s){
      var d=res[s]||{hoy:0,total:0};
      return '<div class="stat"><div class="stat-name">'+s+'</div>'
        +'<div class="stat-num">'+d.hoy+'</div>'
        +'<div class="stat-tot">Histórico: '+d.total+'</div>'
        +'<div class="stat-pill">hoy</div></div>';
    }).join('');
  }).withFailureHandler(function(){}).getResumenSupervisores();
}
function buscar(){
  var sup=document.getElementById('fil-sup').value;
  var desde=iso2dmy(document.getElementById('fil-desde').value);
  var hasta=iso2dmy(document.getElementById('fil-hasta').value);
  document.getElementById('tbody').innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="9" class="empty"><span class="spin"></span></td></tr>';
  google.script.run
    .withSuccessHandler(function(list){
      document.getElementById('lbl-tot').textContent=list.length+' registro(s)';
      if(!list.length){document.getElementById('tbody').innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="9" class="empty">Sin resultados</td></tr>';return;}
      document.getElementById('tbody').innerHTML=list.map(function(r){
        var estCls=r.estado==='Falta'?'pill-red':r.estado==='Descanso'?'pill-amb':'pill-grn';
        return '<tr><td>'+xe(r.fecha)+'</td><td>'+xe(r.dni)+'</td>'
          +'<td class="td-n">'+xe(r.nombre)+'</td>'
          +'<td><span class="pill pill-red">'+xe(r.supervisor)+'</span></td>'
          +'<td><span class="pill '+estCls+'">'+xe(r.estado||'Trabajo')+'</span></td>'
          +'<td><span class="pill pill-blue">'+xe(r.codigoLabor)+'</span></td>'
          +'<td>'+xe(r.lote)+'</td>'
          +'<td class="pill-h">'+xe(r.horaInicio)+'</td>'
          +'<td class="pill-h">'+(r.horaFin||'—')+'</td></tr>';
      }).join('');
    })
    .withFailureHandler(function(e){document.getElementById('tbody').innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="9" class="empty">Error: '+xe(e.message)+'</td></tr>';})
    .getRegistrosAdmin({supervisor:sup,fechaDesde:desde,fechaHasta:hasta});
}
function limpiar(){
  document.getElementById('fil-sup').value='TODOS';
  document.getElementById('fil-desde').value='';
  document.getElementById('fil-hasta').value='';
  document.getElementById('lbl-tot').textContent='';
  document.getElementById('tbody').innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="9" class="empty">Use los filtros y presione Buscar</td></tr>';
}
function cargarHist(){
  var sup=document.getElementById('fil-hist').value;
  document.getElementById('cont-hist').innerHTML='<p class="empty"><span class="spin"></span></p>';
  google.script.run
    .withSuccessHandler(function(list){
      if(!list.length){document.getElementById('cont-hist').innerHTML='<p class="empty">Sin historial</p>';return;}
      var g={};list.forEach(function(r){if(!g[r.supervisor])g[r.supervisor]=[];g[r.supervisor].push(r);});
      var h='';
      Object.keys(g).sort().forEach(function(s){
        var items=g[s];
        h+='<div class="tcard"><div class="thead"><div class="hist-h"><svg viewBox="0 0 18 18" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M13 16v-1.5a3 3 0 00-3-3H4a3 3 0 00-3 3V16"/><circle cx="7" cy="6" r="3"/></svg> '+xe(s)+' <span class="hist-cnt">'+items.length+'</span></div></div>'
          +'<div class="twrap"><table><thead><tr><th>DNI</th><th>Nombre</th><th>Primera vez</th><th>Última vez</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
          +items.map(function(i){return'<tr><td>'+xe(i.dni)+'</td><td class="td-n">'+xe(i.nombre)+'</td><td>'+xe(i.primeraVez)+'</td><td>'+xe(i.ultimaVez)+'</td></tr>';}).join('')
          +'</tbody></table></div></div>';
      });
      document.getElementById('cont-hist').innerHTML=h;
    })
    .withFailureHandler(function(){document.getElementById('cont-hist').innerHTML='<p class="empty">Error</p>';})
    .getHistorialSupervisor(sup==='TODOS'?'':sup);
}
function exportCSV(){
  var filas=document.querySelectorAll('#tbl tbody tr');
  if(!filas.length||filas[0].querySelector('[colspan]')){alert('Sin datos. Aplique filtros primero.');return;}
  var hdr=['Fecha','DNI','Nombre','Supervisor','Labor','Lote','H.Inicio','H.Fin'];
  var rows=Array.from(filas).map(function(tr){return Array.from(tr.querySelectorAll('td')).map(function(td){return'"'+td.textContent.trim().replace(/"/g,'""')+'"';});});
  var csv=[hdr.join(',')].concat(rows.map(function(r){return r.join(',');})).join('\n');
  var a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(new Blob(['\ufeff'+csv],{type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8;'}));
  a.download='pedregal_'+new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]+'.csv';a.click();
}
function showT(id,msg){var e=document.getElementById(id);e.textContent=msg;e.classList.add('on');}
function clearT(){document.querySelectorAll('.toast').forEach(function(e){e.classList.remove('on');});}
function xe(s){return String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;');}
function iso2dmy(s){if(!s)return'';var p=s.split('-');return p[2]+'/'+p[1]+'/'+p[0];}
document.getElementById('inp-clave').addEventListener('keydown',function(e){if(e.key==='Enter')doLogin();});
</script>
</body>
</html>
